action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 14, 'col': 32}])

Open questions: What exactly changed? Maybe I need to click on divider gaps to move objects.
Plan: Try clicking on the white divider at a gap position.
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
